message: No action needed: The current `main` branch HEAD (eebdab7ceb3e81afae6f03190102e9d9f35f355b, 2026-03-20) and all recent commits have 0 GitHub Check Runs — the CI (Azure Pipelines) does not report per-commit check runs via the GitHub Checks API for direct pushes to main. No new check-run failures can be detected. The most recent known failures are already tracked in open issues #37716 (5 packages, filed 2026-03-18) and #37612 (@azure/attestation, filed 2026-03-12). No new issue is warranted since there are no new failing check runs to analyze.
